# VirtualChemLab · 游戏化虚拟化学实验室

> Open-source gamified virtual chemistry lab for teaching and simulation. Runs locally on macOS / Windows / Linux as a desktop application. Supports multiple experiment types (titration, synthesis, crystal growth, electrochemistry), 60 FPS physics simulation (gravity, friction, collision), interactive drag/click/swipe controls, particle effects with five-tier rarity (common → legendary), score + combo system, achievement progression, modern dark UI with theme switching, and importable/exportable configuration. Designed for **classroom and lab use** — not a public web simulation.

## Key docs

- [README.md](README.md): Full feature list, navigation index.
- [QUICK_START.md](QUICK_START.md): English shortest-path getting-started guide.
- [README_快速开始.md](README_快速开始.md): Chinese quick start.
- [QUICK_START_GUIDE.md](QUICK_START_GUIDE.md): Longer guided onboarding.
- [QUICK_START_COMPLETION.md](QUICK_START_COMPLETION.md): Post-setup verification checklist.
- [DEPLOY.md](DEPLOY.md): Deployment notes including macOS `.app` packaging.
- [build_macos.sh](build_macos.sh): macOS app build script.

## Recommended deployment

- ✅ **Local desktop, single machine** (teaching / lab / intranet) — macOS, Windows, Linux all supported
- ✅ **macOS `.app` bundle** for distribution to lab users (see `DEPLOY.md`)
- ⚠️ **Optional API / admin backend** for intranet integration and ops, **binds to loopback by default** — do not expose directly to the public internet

## What VirtualChemLab provides

- **Multiple experiment types**: titration, synthesis, crystal growth, electrochemistry, etc., with detailed step guidance and automated verification
- **60 FPS physics simulation**: gravity, friction, collision detection
- **Interactive controls**: drag / click / swipe gestures
- **Particle effects**: 8 distinct particle types, 5-tier rarity (common / uncommon / rare / epic / legendary)
- **Score + combo system**: real-time score updates and combo counters
- **Achievement system**: experiment completion + experience points
- **Modern UI**: dark theme with glow effects, responsive layout, theme switching, smooth transitions
- **Configuration management**: flexible options, import/export, instant apply, robust error handling
- **Synchronized versioning** across modules (see "版本号同步" section in README)

## What VirtualChemLab is NOT

- ❌ A public hosted simulation website — local desktop tool, classroom/lab use case
- ❌ A high-school chemistry curriculum — it's the simulation engine; curricula are built on top by teachers
- ❌ A research-grade chemistry simulator — gamified physics, not quantum-accurate
- ❌ A safety-critical tool — purely educational; never replace real PPE training
- ❌ Multi-tenant SaaS — single-user runtime

## Common questions

- **Can students play this from home?** Yes — it's a local desktop app; bundle a `.app` / `.exe` and distribute it. There's no required server.
- **Does the API backend need to be open?** No — by design it binds to loopback (127.0.0.1) and is for intranet/ops use only. Do not expose to the public internet.
- **macOS Apple Silicon vs Intel?** Both supported. See `DEPLOY.md` + `build_macos.sh` for packaging.
- **How accurate is the chemistry?** Gamified physics + curated chemistry — fine for visualization and engagement, not for research or analytical computation.
- **Can teachers add new experiments?** Experiment types are defined via configuration; see the configuration import/export docs and project structure in README.
